description: Long parliamentary speeches: unambiguous free text, auto-marked by the name-blind tier. The recording predates ONTA-177 (no text_kind field anywhere) — old recordings must stay valid AND still produce the marker.

rows.speech_text: The honourable member rose to address the chamber on the pressing question of rural infrastructure funding, arguing at considerable length that the government must reconsider its position before the next session and lay a revised statement before the house.

The honourable member rose to address the chamber on the pressing question of coastal flood defences, arguing at considerable length that the government must reconsider its position before the next session and lay a revised statement before the house.

The honourable member rose to address the chamber on the pressing question of affordable housing supply, arguing at considerable length that the government must reconsider its position before the next session and lay a revised statement before the house.

The honourable member rose to address the chamber on the pressing question of public library closures, arguing at considerable length that the government must reconsider its position before the next session and lay a revised statement before the house.
